message: Adaptive laundering robustness cannot be claimed until laundering trace scores and summaries cover all required attack conditions.
Unknown-base or base-mismatch deployment cannot be claimed until correct, neighboring same-family, and different-family reference conditions exist.
Open-set or absent-teacher attribution cannot be claimed unless abstention and false-attribution summaries cover all required conditions.
Full review-time reproducibility requires generated traces, adapters/checkpoints, scored matrices, run logs, and environment locks in the manifest.
Broad cross-family generalization requires validated within-family and cross-family student-matrix evidence.
Prefer the exact audited false-positive rate and scope instead of near-zero wording.
Replace perfection language with the exact metric and tested stratum.
Use operating sensitivity or point-estimate stress-test wording unless adaptive robustness is validated.
Frame the result as statistical evidence under an audited null, not as a legal or absolute decision.
